plugins.name: pupfish-qlik
plugins.description: Qlik Sense development plugin for Claude Code: 12 skills, 7 specialist agents, and a syntax-validation hook. Distilled from years of Qlik consulting.

plugins.name: qlik-agents
plugins.description: Regimented 9-phase development pipeline for Qlik Sense — requirements through documentation. Structured workflow with strict phase gates; most users should prefer pupfish-qlik for ad-hoc work.
